description_long: This is a round, thick muffin with a dark brown, slightly uneven surface, featuring visible cracks and embedded chocolate chips. The muffin has a rustic, homemade appearance, with a rough, matte finish and a dense, cake-like texture. The chocolate chips are scattered irregularly across the top and sides, some partially melted into the surface. There is no visible frosting, glaze, or decorative elements beyond the chocolate chips. The base of the muffin is slightly wider than the top, giving it a squat, domed profile. No wrapper or paper liner is visible, and the muffin appears to be isolated against a plain white background.
description: A dark brown, round muffin with a rough, cracked surface and scattered chocolate chips, lacking any visible wrapper or frosting.
description_view_0: This view shows the muffin's top and front, highlighting the uneven, cracked surface and several prominent chocolate chips.
description_view_1: The muffin appears slightly flatter from this angle, with fewer visible chips and more emphasis on the rough, matte texture.
description_view_2: This side view reveals a more rounded profile and a few embedded chocolate chips, with the surface cracks less pronounced.
description_view_3: The muffin's side is shown with a focus on the irregular surface and a cluster of chocolate chips near the edge.
